game_info.title: Neon Core Runner
game_info.description:
Welcome to **Neon Core Runner**. You are a sentient data packet trapped inside a decaying mainframe. Your objective is to traverse the corrupted sectors, collect Data Bits for integrity, avoid the red Virus protocols, and reach the Extraction Portal at the end of the sector.

The mainframe has security layers. Some obstacles are "Phasable" (Cyan color). You can destabilize your core to pass through them, but this consumes your Stability energy. Manage your energy wisely!
game_info.controls:
- **Arrow Left / Right**: Move the data packet horizontally.
- **Space**: Jump (Hold for higher jump).
- **Shift**: **Phase Mode**. Hold to pass through Cyan obstacles. Consumes Stability.
- **Z**: **Pulse Blast**. Fire a projectile to destroy basic Viruses.
- **R**: Restart the game (from Game Over screens).
- **Enter**: Start the game.
- **Esc**: Pause / Unpause.

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic physics engine stability and collision detection.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot will jump continuously and move back and forth in a confined area to test gravity, floor collision, and wall collision without crashing.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player stays within bounds, lands on ground after jumping, and does not fall through the floor. FPS remains stable.

TEST_2.test_description: Attempt to complete the level using a heuristic pathfinding strategy.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot moves right towards the goal. It detects obstacles ahead (walls or pits) and jumps. It activates Phase mode when encountering cyan obstacles.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player progresses through the level, successfully navigates platforms, and reaches the goal portal or achieves a high distance score.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot stands still and fires projectiles periodically while enemies approach.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Projectiles spawn, travel, and destroy enemies upon contact. Score increases.
